/usr/bin/ar qc libWWShade.a CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shd6bumpdiff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shd6bumpspec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shd7bumpdiff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shd7bumpspec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shd8bumpdiff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shd8bumpspec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdbumpdiff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdbumpspec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdcubemap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shddef.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shddeffactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shddefmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdforcelinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdglossmask.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdhwshader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdinterface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdlegacyw3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdlib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdloader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdmesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdrenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdsimple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWShade.dir/shdsubmesh.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libWWShade.a
